text.title: SOLO TRAVEL to BARCELONA Vlog | La Sagrada, Getting Braids, Shopping, tapas & more ( +Travel Guide)
text.u: [Music]
hi I'm princess I'm 23 years old and
this is my first ever solo trip you know
how you say you're going to do something
and then you just do it well that's how
I ended up in Spain now I can't lie I
did cry profusely as I was prepping and
packing for this trip because I was
scared out of my mind you know when you
go solo a lot of things could go wrong
but I'm back from my trip now and I can
safely say going solo was the best thing
I could have ever done so grab a snack
and get comfortable and let's enjoy
Barcelona together and if you're
planning your own trip don't forget to
use my travel guide down vow
[Music]
enjoy I just got this camera on the way
to the airport so I'm not sure what the
audio is like so I have a connecting
flight from Dallas to Philadelphia and
then from Philadelphia to
[Music]
Barcelona I literally have my sleeping
whatever my sleepware because I plan to
be asleep with on flight literally I
love sleeping on
[Music]
flights so what are you going to do in
the next 2 hours um I'll probably just
like edit some videos during my 2hour
layover at the Philadelphia Airport I
made some friends I found these two
girls they were pretty they seemed nice
I got to chatting and before you know it
by the time we landed in Barcelona we
had made plans for day
[Music]
one in
Barcelona hi
guys I didn't know we were going to be
coming off the plane like off the
plane I was like oh this is
different one of my biggest concerns
about this trip was Transportation
getting around Ubers taxi the Metro so I
got at Ola Barcelona card with the girls
and we were able to take a train to
their hotel and then a taxi to mine
navigating the Metro System was a little
bit difficult but it wasn't impossible
and at some point we figured it out and
then the rest of the trip I did not have
any problems with the Metro except for
getting lost a couple times but we'll
get to that later
[Music]
the girls strapped off their stuff at
their hotel so I'm taking a taxi to my
hotel just cuz I'm just logging this
luggage around has been a bit of a
hassle well it's not like too much of a
hassle it's just like I'm not used to it
and it's heavy and I'm small so I just
found a taxi and it's like €1 from their
hotel to mine
and it's only 12 years because one of
the roads is like blocked off but other
than that we are here and Barcelona is
so beautiful so pretty here I wish I
spoke the language because I don't know
but yeah I'm really excited I got to go
back to my hotel check in and then get
ready because we're going to go see the
La La
[Music]
Familia s basically the big you know
thing in our like that the really big
Cathedral that they spent like a really
long time building until then enjoy some
views of
Barcelona I'm going for the
Disco I will find a great
[Music]
love I'll take Okay so I just checked
into my
hotel and I specifically booked the
balcony view just cuz I wanted a balcony
I thought that'd be really cute the
hotel is literally right in the center
of um pla Ro which is basically like a
square and in the Square they have so
many different restaurants I'll show you
guys when we go outside but that's why I
chose it cuz it's pretty Central to
restaurants and I just wanted food to be
walking distance at all times on my way
like walking over here I was so excited
like I love this place this place makes
me realize how much I hate the suburbs
like I love cities I love just like
everything being closed I love seeing
people walking around like it just does
something to my my soul like I just love
this so much and I'm just so excited to
explore literally I was walking over
here and I saw a pharmacy it's like a
two step away literally because I forgot
my face wash and you know we're in
Europe and of course we're gonna have L
Ro POS so I'm gonna get that um later
but right now I'm just in my hotel
update so um the lady just told me that
they're actually going to upgrade my
room the Lord's favor is already
beginning so I'm upgrading to King Grom
I hope it has like a wider balcony I'm
excited to see what it looks like cuz
this place is really pretty like I love
the vibe you guys know I love like
old kind of like medieval a little bit
more like that what's the word for
it that Renaissance type feel I'm want
to see if this thing can stand on its
own oh my gosh it can can you
imagine it can stand on its own look how
much I stuff this bag but I need to
charge my phone with the portable char
charger every minute counts okay I'm
going to go and talk to Tik Tok really
quickly bye
guys okay so P just go inside now hang
get a okay let me oh no no no you're
good oh wow this is beautiful
yeah I love it go to the
bathroom oh
oh my gosh the bathroom is gorgeous
perfect so right here you have a little
treat anything you need well this one is
compliment and then you have the mini
bar there and the Min is right here okay
okay thank you she over thank you see
you I have a freaking
balcony okay this room is crazy gorgeous
trust me I was researching hard and the
king bed and spacious okay I'm going to
do a quick little walk through cuz like
I said we don't have that much time but
you walk in so it's like this little
walkway and then it's the bed it's pan
so you can see how high the ceilings
are the feel of the
room my favorite
part is the
bathroom you can shut up hello are you
kidding me and it has
robes oh really like get the gist of
everything oh my God the bathroom has a
window too oh shut up shut up shut up
shut
up guys I made it to the Las Familia but
why did I forget to grab a jacket like
it was hot earlier now I'm freezing so I
definitely need to get a CL I'm trying
to see where the entrance
is it can't even fit in the screen let
go co
[Music]
oh my
God wao if you guys could see what I see
right now
[Music]
[Music]
[Music]
the Las Familia was on the top of the
list of things I wanted to see in
Barcelona because I'd heard about how
people would come here and cry
especially my friend who studied abroad
she told me to come and I love art I
love the fact that G's Vision 100 years
later is still being worked on it's
still being brought to life it's just
such a beautiful place and I'm just so
lucky that I got to see in person but I
was also so so so cold I forgot my
jackets so we're going to wrap this up
and go home now okay
yeah
insane so many facts and it all is about
Jesus I love me some Jesus Christ if
you're planning a visit soon the light
that hits Su stained glass windows
between 3 and 4 p.m. is
perfect yeah it's really
cool and eat and then maybe we can meet
back up later okay it was nice to see
you nice to see you have a nice to solar
traveling is so cool I keep making
friends yeah so I was standing there and
she asked me to take a photo of
her um and I was like yeah sure and I
noticed that she had this on her phone
and I just know that a lot of people
like who were toward first have that so
I asked her like oh where are you from
oh it's so
[Music]
cold um I seem to be going away from my
hotel so let's let's get back on
track and I don't know if you guys can
see but it gets like really dark early
so right now it's like 5:00 p.m. and
it's already pretty dark so
I also have to figure
out
um what time I want to call a quck when
it comes to just being out late cuz you
know I don't want to be out by
myself I just made it back to my
room oh my God it's been such a long
day but it's been such an amazing day I
still can't believe I'm here like I can
believe it but I can't at the same time
like this is kind of
surreal um I don't know like I can't
believe I almost didn't come that's so
funny and these freaking um Puma
sneakers that I bought they're not like
super comfortable to walk around and so
my feet is hurting a little bit let's
have a little
chitchat I think I'm going to take a
bath the bathtub looks really clean but
I'm still going to clean it just run a
bath and the concierge downstairs he's
supposed to be sending me um some
restaurant options for dinner I don't
know if I want to get dressed for dinner
like do my makeup and everything I know
I'm just going to dinner by myself but
you know
like I I just feel like you know getting
cute for dinner with Princess would be
feel really nice I don't know what type
of dinner spot he's going to recommend
to me so I guess that would determine
what I wear to dinner oh and I don't
know if I told you guys but I am trying
to find someone to braid my hair like my
hair doesn't look bad but it doesn't
look the best found someone who can do
it but the thing is on her page she
works with a lot of like T 3A 3B 4 a
hair textures I've only seen like one
person with like fory hair texture so
I'm really hoping this other lady text
me back who's actually the one who I've
seen like fory hair
textures I'm hoping she text me back
like please Lord I want to get it
literally as soon as possible like I
will take this down tonight um so I can
have my hair braided I think I'm going
to do blonde like change it up and do
some blonde braids you know when you're
in Bara you got to go
blonde oh my God I have a cramp in my
leg okay okay okay o oh I'm not kidding
ignore the mess guys I sent the room
tour in my family group chat oh what
time is it in Dallas I don't even know
it's only 10:00 a.m. oh y'all need to
wake up and clock
in how was it only 10:00 a.m. let's see
who picks
up
guys hola
Chas my Spanish baby
girl CH no ch
[Music]
so I decided I'm actually just going to
go ahead and just go grab dinner
because the thought of showering and
like getting all cozy and then going out
again to get food is just kind of scary
but I put on gloves in the thicker coat
cuz it's colder outside and I can't lie
this is kind of a look it's really cute
I'm also kind of sleepy now I think the
jet lag is starting to kick in
[Music]
yes H and with mozzarella on top sorry
with mozzarella on top okay per and you
guys have any barking water or bottle of
water I have yeah just water yeah thank
you I feel so rude talking to people in
their home country with my foreign
language it's not even my language you
know this is The White Man's language
you guys know I love pasta so we're
going to we're just going to do pasta
today I'm a pasta girl
[Music]
[Music]
cheers so I just took the best shower
ever the shower is so hot and War like
the water was so
warm so you know shout out to them I
can't wait to leave this hotel a review
like they're going to get the like I
don't even leave reviews but they're
going to get the best review ever
because when I first booked this place
like it really didn't have that much
like reviews or I guess like videos on
Tik Tok and stuff I forgot to pack a
bonnet so I definitely need to decide if
I'm getting my hair
[Music]
redone all right guys
so in my like very stuffy face right now
I was praying and I was saying like you
know like you know God like protect me
you know like I don't want to be afraid
like I'm not
scared um but you
know and I don't know I was just praying
and I was just like really having truly
quiet time with God because right now
like I have no one else but God in the
sense
like but anyways I say all that to say
so like after I pray I be like okay God
what do you want to tell me today and
I'll open like whatever I land on I'll
open it and I'll read it and like most
times it'll be so spoton to either what
I'm praying for what I'm asking God
about which is kind of just like this
little thing that like I do with god um
and the verse that I was I opened today
so spot on and it's Isaiah
44 and it literally said yet hear me now
oh Jacob my servant in Israel whom I
have chosen thus says the Lord who made
you and formed you from the womb who
will help you fear not oh Jacob my
servant and you jam who I have chosen
for I will pour water on him who is
thirsty and then it goes down to like
you know say like all of these bless
Bings and it says again fear not besides
me there is no God do not fear not be
afraid have I not told you from that
time and declared it and I don't know I
just feel like I was like having a
conversation with god and he's just like
you know fear not like have I not told
you this before you know and I don't
know I just thought that was really cool
and what I was reading I had the thought
to like prop up my camera which can
sometimes feel really weird like
propping up my camera to like record
myself praying because I don't know like
sometimes it feels this genuine to just
like like oh look at me guys I pray but
I think there's a purpose behind it so I
don't know that's what I did I was just
being obedient and I just wanted to
share that little anecdote oh my god
I've been recording for 5 minutes it's
crazy okay this is going to be a really
long Vlog but I'm going to go to bed now
for real for real we have a long day
tomorrow it's literally like
it's 2:37 a.m. so yeah your girl needs
to catch some z's
[Music]
ciao good
morning I'm on the way to get my hair
done I'm sorry the reason I didn't take
my braids down like in the front is cuz
I wasn't sure if you guys like could
work with my hair yeah but only have uh
I
uh give me one second somebody call
speak good English okay it's so cute
[Music]
here I was so nervous getting my hair
done I did not know what to expect but
this is probably the best braiding
experience I've ever experienced as a
black woman with every braid and pull I
did not feel a thing it was so painless
tension free and most importantly they
treated me like such a princess like
look at how clean these braids are okay
but also let's get into the face
card we're almost done
[Music]
[Music]
she's on
vacation I'm so obsessed so I had her
cut it SE and
[Music]
okay I love it I'm going to this Market
funny enough I was going to go
here um tomorrow so I guess we'll do it
today this is the mar laia it's
basically like a
supermarket they have like different
foods and stuff so I'm just going to try
some stuff out and see see how we're
feeling
[Music]
drink is actually really
good this is such a nice place to
like go to the grocery store I'm sorry y
it's a lot of good looking men in
Barcelona there's so much to explore
here what is this churros with Nutella
I shouldn't have bought this until I was
like done exploring cuz now my hands are
cold I am the best person to travel
because I'm not a picky eater so I
really got to try a lot of interesting
things I would normally not eat in the
states so here we
[Music]
go hi guys
um so oh okay it's it's
ready I'm going to watch guys go

like it doesn't look like what I thought
it would gross tastes like lemon

no no no I like
it did you square the lemon in it I did

oh suck oh it's on the

hello
welome how do I peel

folks right it wasn't as bad as I

yeah that's going to be good this the

far I think I was eight some salt and

in what
66 that's all I said that that little
log we had was like 3 minut I wasn't
kidding I don't know about you but I'm
always in the mood for ice cream I don't
care how cold it is outside it could be
negative de and I will always say yes to
gelato and this gelato was actually
really good I don't remember the flavors
but it was good honestly I feel like
anything there would have been good
honestly so when you go let me know how
you like the Gelato at Anita gelato and
also the guy who worked there was really
really nice and they were playing alfro
beats it was actually so
perfect that's what did here for
usuh like soft I
don't um I came back and I took a very
long nap no I'm I'm talking to the Vlog
and now it's 1 I think it took properly
you know talk to y'all cuz we had a big
back day right after but they did so
good and like it doesn't hurt the lines
are so
clean and like they just they do what
they had to do tomorrow we have a long
day of
shopping so stay tuned for that

can you hear
them I don't know if you guys can see
but like everyone's out and
active and apparently here in Spain
people don't like when people go out
they go out at 1:00 a.m. just like
Nigeria let's do some skin care

that's hi B okay guys so I just got

little get ready with me it was really

making it but this is the jack
KET and I think we did a pretty good

going to go grab some
tapas cuz I'm hungry so we're going to
go eat really quick I've been doing

pictures I tried to film and get dressed
with me but I started getting shy and
then it said my storage was full that
was crazy so we're going to go eat and
then I'll come back
and you know regroup and then we'll go
out again it's a nice Saturday here in
Spain the people are just you know
getting on with their lives and I just
love that for them
honestly guys I'm at the plaza the

real so this is actually where my hotel
is right
there almost fell when I was walking

I just finished eating the food was good
I see why there's a line the food is
actually it was pretty
good so I'm on my way to the Barcelona
port and I'm taking like this 1 hour
tour around the entire Port I'm excited
and Tik Tok got banned yesterday so it
was really hard trying to remember like
what these places I put on my intinerary
like look like and what they're about so
I had to rely on Google which is crazy
because they cancel Tik Tok at the worst
time I had so much saved on there for
this trip I didn't know it I was going
to get Tik Tok cancelled here in
Barcelona I thought I mean it's only
banned in America like when you're in
America and I was like how did they know
but I guess they probably just banned
all of their American
users doy I I was thinking they would
just ban it in like when you're in the
so I felt the Tik Tok band too
unfortunately but I'll talk to you guys
when we get there

byea come with me I'll take

ship

what €0 wasted cuz he took me to some

wow it's beautiful it's so gorgeous it's

guys the way I almost got carried away

we were traveling yesterday today we
first finally saw everybody didn't have
access to it yeah I was on the phone
with my friends in my hotel and we were
like scrolling scrolling and then it was
like update I was like oh my gosh I
thought because I wasn't in the country
it wouldn't you know affect me but I
haven't D today it won't let
me where are you guys from
ooh that's nice he
[Music]
[Music]
guys look at this cute photo of
me that they gave us from the port I
look so adorable I was like I can give
this to my mom I can be like look at
your
da can put this on the fridge go to the
house every time I come to the house I
can be like yeah this is a girl who went
to Barcelona all by
herself it looks even better
at guys I'm not sad because they said I
can come
tomorrow but I missed it for like 10
minutes but it's cuz you know the Cru I
mean the ship was like a little bit late
and then by the time my taxi got here it
was just like taking a time to get get a
taxi but it's so beautiful and I can't
wait to go inside got to wake up early
tomorrow and start my day earlier but
honestly that's also part of why I made
the strip so long was because I didn't
want to have like a super packed
itinerary either like you
know so honestly I'm fine with all I've
done today super
satisfied tomorrow though that's when
we're going to try to pack it in because
then I only have 2 days left so tomorrow
is Monday I'll have Monday and Tuesday

because we are going to a flea market
it's super big super popular Barcelona
but the only thing is they're notorious
for pickpocketing and this was the one
place I did not feel safe as a Solo
Traveler because there was a time where
I felt like this guy was following me
but don't worry I had my Taser I had my
um pepper spray I had everything on Deck
ready and they do have like law
enforcement and police officers circling
the place and then I met these girls who
kind of just like stuck with me the
whole time and like we shopped around
together but this place was really cool
everything was so cheap I found jewelry
watches purses is like so many cool
stuff for like5 €4 you just have to keep
negotiating with them because they will
try to play you when they hear that you
were not from Barcelona but all in all
this is a really cool experience it was
a little scary but it was really

marketplace I left with the girls um cuz

I was like oh you guys speak English um
and they were like study abro students
so I just like stayed with them the
whole time and like they were just

guys hi guys good morning lost my voice
A lot happened in the last couple hours

story short I started my period today
and oh my God I was so mad I was so mad
I was so angry which doesn't make sense
because if I had my period I had my
period 2 weeks ago so can someone please
tell me if this is normal like I
actually gbt and I'm just like kind of
upset because excuse me um it's the last
day here in Barcelona I met this guy
yesterday um we ended up like going out
last night like went we went to a lot of
places it was really fun so now we're
going to brch and it's the last day so
basically all I'm doing today is just
exploring
um like trying to find gifts for like my

be like
but yeah I'm going to brunch and I'll
talk to you guys later
bye as much as I enjoyed being solo it
was really nice to have some company on
the last day I was also able to explore
a couple more shops a couple more
vintage stores walk around made it to
the beach and all of this was perfect
because I got to see things that I
wouldn't have necessarily done on my
itinerary and I was able to add that to
my travel guide as well so if you're
planning a trip to Barcelona there's a
lot more stuff on the Travel Guide than

young people do um mind you it's a

and there's like so many people out

yeah no that's that's what I learn like

I can't believe I actually made it to

you been saying you I okay I I forget

around and then like watching
TV um but yeah this is the end of my
Barcelona
Adventure leaving I feel like so like
full like so happy so like so full like
so full of life so joyful like I just
like I feel like my skin even looks
better I can't believe I was here for a
whole entire week that's crazy by myself
and it was amazing like amazing okay I
just wanted to let you guys know that
I'm on my way to the airport the hotel
called me a taxi which is very nice um
so my flight is at 1:30 it's 11: I know
I should have been at the airport 5
hours early but you
know also I don't know if I told you
guys this but I lost my iPad well I left
my iPad on the plane here so I'm like
praying and I'm just like praying
praying that when I get to the American
Airlines check in I'm able to like ask
them about their lost and found cuz I
fil the lost and found like report or
dispute or whatever but they never got
back to me they never emailed me back so
hopefully I get to like get my iPad back
before we have to go home this is the
end of our Barcelona Vlog I'm headed
home sad
face but I'm headed home with Just Like

so full of life you know and the only
thing that's going to ruin this feeling
is when I go home and check how much
money I spent in
